CORE.RESTART_MESSAGE: This plugin requires a restart to take effect. Do you want to restart now?

BADGES.NAME: Badges
BADGES.DESCRIPTION: Adds raincord badges to raincord devs and supporters

DEBUG.NAME: Debug
DEBUG.DESCRIPTION: Send debug info about rain to the current channel

PLUGINS.NAME: Plugins
PLUGINS.DESCRIPTION: Send your plugin info to the current channel

THEMES.NAME: Themes
THEMES.DESCRIPTION: Send your theme info to the current channel

ERRORBOUNDARY.NAME: ErrorBoundary
ERRORBOUNDARY.DESCRIPTION: Patches ErrorBoundaries to show recovery options
ERRORBOUNDARY.CRASHED: A crash occurred while rendering a component. This could be caused by Rain or Discord itself.

PAINTER.NAME: Painter
PAINTER.DESCRIPTION: Customize Discord's appearance with themes and fonts

RAINENHANCEMENTS.NAME: RainEnhancements
RAINENHANCEMENTS.DESCRIPTION: Combines many plugins into one to improve your experience
RAINENHANCEMENTS.REALMOJI_DESC: Transform fake emojis into real ones
RAINENHANCEMENTS.REALSTICKER_DESC: Transform fake stickers into real ones

RAIN_POSITIONS.TITLE: Settings Position
RAIN_POSITIONS.TOP: At the top of the settings page

CLOUDSYNC.NAME: CloudSync
CLOUDSYNC.DESCRIPTION: Sync your plugins, themes, and fonts to the cloud.
CLOUDSYNC.AUTHORIZE_WITH_DISCORD_DESC: Required to sync your data to the cloud
CLOUDSYNC.AUTHORIZED_DESC: You are logged in and ready to sync your data
CLOUDSYNC.LOG_OUT_DESC: Disconnect your account from Cloud Sync
CLOUDSYNC.SYNC_TO_CLOUD_DESC: Upload your current plugins, themes, and fonts
CLOUDSYNC.IMPORT_FROM_CLOUD_DESC: Download and apply your saved data
CLOUDSYNC.AUTO_SYNC_DESC: Automatically sync changes to the cloud

ACCOUNTSWITCHER.NAME: AccountSwitcher
ACCOUNTSWITCHER.DESCRIPTION: Enables account switcher because discord got rid of experiment

ACTIONSHEETFINDER.NAME: ActionSheetFinder
ACTIONSHEETFINDER.DESCRIPTION: Utility plugin to find ActionSheet key of pressed sheet. Mostly used by developers to find action sheet keys.

SETTINGS.PRESS_ACTIONSHEET: Press an action sheet to see its key here.

ALWAYSTRUST.NAME: AlwaysTrust
ALWAYSTRUST.DESCRIPTION: Disable the untrusted link popup for every link

ANIMATEDKEYBOARD.NAME: AnimatedKeyboard
ANIMATEDKEYBOARD.DESCRIPTION: Enables animated keyboard via experiment override

ANIMATEDPROFILES.NAME: AnimatedProfiles
ANIMATEDPROFILES.DESCRIPTION: Custom animated profile pictures and backgrounds using UserPFP and UserBG

BETTERCHATBUTTONS.NAME: BetterChatButtons
BETTERCHATBUTTONS.DESCRIPTION: Customize all the annoying chat buttons

SETTINGS.FORCE_SHOW_NEW_THREAD_BUTTON_DESC: Show the thread button even when you can't start threads, or when the chat input is not focused
SETTINGS.ACTION_BUTTON_COLLAPSE_TYPING_DESC: Collapse action buttons when you start typing.
SETTINGS.SEND_BUTTONCOLLAPSE_TYPING_DESC: Collapse the Send button when the message box is empty.

BETTERSILENTLEAVE.NAME: SilentLeave
BETTERSILENTLEAVE.DESCRIPTION: Adds a button to leave groups silently.
BETTERSILENTLEAVE.ARE_YOU_SURE: Are you sure you want to leave this group silently?

BLUETOOTHAUDIOFIX.NAME: BluetoothAudioFix
BLUETOOTHAUDIOFIX.DESCRIPTION: Prevents Discord from enabling handsfree mode while in a call
BLUETOOTHAUDIOFIX.NOTHING_ON_IOS: This plugin does not do anything on iOS

BYPASSUPLOADLIMIT.NAME: BypassUploadLimit
BYPASSUPLOADLIMIT.DESCRIPTION: Bypass Discord's file size limit by uploading to Catbox, Litterbox or Zipline
BYPASSUPLOADLIMIT.UPLOAD_FAILED_CONSOLE: Upload failed — check the console for details.

UPLOAD_BEHAVIOR.TITLE: Behavior
UPLOAD_BEHAVIOR.ALWAYS_UPLOAD_DESC: Upload to the service even if under the limit
UPLOAD_BEHAVIOR.USE_HYPERLINK_DESC: Use a markdown hyperlink so the filename is shown in chat

UPLOAD_ACTION.TITLE: Upload Action
UPLOAD_ACTION.LINK_COPIED: Uploaded and link copied to clipboard!
UPLOAD_ACTION.INSERT_TO_INPUT_FAILED: Could not insert into chat box.
UPLOAD_ACTION.INSERT_TO_INPUT_SENT: Uploaded and link sent to chat!
UPLOAD_ACTION.INSERT_TO_INPUT_SEND_UPLOADED: Upload succeeded but failed to send message.
UPLOAD_ACTION.INSERT_TO_INPUT_SEND_FAILED: Could not send message to chat.

LITTERBOX.NAME: Litterbox
LITTERBOX.DESCRIPTION: Files expire after a set duration, max 1GB
LITTERBOX.FILE_TOO_LARGE_LITTERBOX: File too large — maximum supported size is 1 GB

UGUU.NAME: Uguu
UGUU.DESCRIPTION: Files are stored temporarily, max 128MB, expires in 3h

ZIPLINE.NAME: Zipline
ZIPLINE.DESCRIPTION: Self-hosted file host instance, can be stored permanently or temporarily

CHATBOXAVATAR.NAME: ChatboxAvatar
CHATBOXAVATAR.DESCRIPTION: Adds your avatar to the chatbox.

CHATBUBBLES.NAME: ChatBubbles
CHATBUBBLES.DESCRIPTION: Adds customizable chat bubbles to the chat, similar to Flowercord

SETTINGS.BUBBLE_COLOR_DESC: #rrggbb or leave empty for theme default

CLEANURLS.NAME: CleanURLs
CLEANURLS.DESCRIPTION: Remove tracking parameters and redirect wrappers from URLs

MANAGE_BUTTONS.TITLE: Manage Buttonss
MANAGE_BUTTONS.HIDE_UNKNOWN_BUTTONS_DESC: Hide action sheet rows not in the list above

DASHLESS.NAME: Dashless
DASHLESS.DESCRIPTION: Changes dashes in text channel names to spaces

DECOR.NAME: Decor
DECOR.DESCRIPTION: Create and use your own custom avatar decorations, or pick your favorite from the presets.
DECOR.ARE_YOU_SURE: Are you sure you want to delete {decorationName}?
DECOR.ARE_YOU_SURE_THIS_DECORATION: Are you sure you want to delete this decoration?
DECOR.DECORATION_PENDING_REVIEW_DESC: Your submission is awaiting approval. You cannot submit another until it's reviewed.
DECOR.SUBMIT_NEW_DECORATION_DESC: Submit your own custom decoration for review
DECOR.NO_IMAGE_SELECTED: No image selected — tap to browse
DECOR.FILE_MUST_BE_PNG_OR_APNG: File must be a PNG or APNG.
DECOR.APNG_PREVIEW_NOT_ANIMATED_ON_ANDROID: APNGs will not animate in the preview on Android.
DECOR.MAKE_SURE_DECORATION_FOLLOWS_GUIDELINES: Make sure your decoration does not violate [the guidelines](https://github.com/decor-discord/.github/blob/main/GUIDELINES.md) before submitting.

EXPERIMENTS.NAME: Experiments
EXPERIMENTS.DESCRIPTION: Enables Discord Staff settings, continue with caution

EXPRESSIONUTILS_TODO.NAME: ExpressionUtils
EXPRESSIONUTILS_TODO.DESCRIPTION: Manage emojis and stickers with ease. Adds context menu options to emojis and stickers.

SETTINGS.USE_HYPERLINK_EMOJIS: Use hyperlinks when sending fake emojis
SETTINGS.USE_HYPERLINK_STICKERS: Use hyperlinks when sending fake stickers

GLOBALBADGES.NAME: GlobalBadges
GLOBALBADGES.DESCRIPTION: Display custom badges from various Discord mod clients

SETTINGS.LOAD_BADGES_ON_LEFT_DESC: If enabled, custom badges will load up first than the original badges.
SETTINGS.DISABLE_MOD_BADGES_DESC: If enabled, it will disable mod client badges but not custom badges.
SETTINGS.DISABLE_CUSTOM_BADGES_DESC: If enabled, it will disable custom badges but not mod client badges.

HIDDENCHANNELS.NAME: HiddenChannels
HIDDENCHANNELS.DESCRIPTION: View hidden channels with permission bypass
HIDDENCHANNELS.SHOW_LOCK_ICON_DESC: Show a lock icon to the right of hidden channel names.
HIDDENCHANNELS.SHOW_POPUP_DESC: Toggle the information popup that appears when selecting hidden channels.

HIDEBLOCKEDANDIGNOREDMESSAGES.NAME: HideBlockedAndIgnoredMessages
HIDEBLOCKEDANDIGNOREDMESSAGES.DESCRIPTION: A plugin that removes the `X blocked or ignored message/s` prompt and replies to the blocked or ignored messages from chat.
HIDEBLOCKEDANDIGNOREDMESSAGES.REMOVE_REPLIES_TO_MESSAGES_DESC: Filters messages replying to blocked or ignored users.

HIDECALLBUTTONS.NAME: HideCallButtons
HIDECALLBUTTONS.DESCRIPTION: Hides call buttons from dms, user profiles and vcs

MESSAGELOGGER_WIP.NAME: MessageLogger
MESSAGELOGGER_WIP.DESCRIPTION: Prevents deleted messages from being lost by storing them in memory

MORECONFIRM.NAME: MoreConfirm
MORECONFIRM.DESCRIPTION: Prompts confirmations before making irreversible actions.
MORECONFIRM.ARE_YOU_SURE_START_A_GROUP_CALL: Are you sure you want to start the group call?
MORECONFIRM.ARE_YOU_SURE_START_A_GROUP_VIDEO_CALL: Are you sure you want to start the group video call?
MORECONFIRM.ARE_YOU_SURE_START_A_CALL_WITH_USER: Are you sure you want to call {username}#{discriminator}?
MORECONFIRM.ARE_YOU_SURE_START_A_VIDEO_CALL_WITH_USE: Are you sure you want to video call {username}#{discriminator}?
MORECONFIRM.ARE_YOU_SURE_BLOCK_USER: Are you sure you want to block {username}#{discriminator}?
MORECONFIRM.ARE_YOU_SURE_FRIEND_USER: Are you sure you want to friend {username}#{discriminator}?

MOYAI.NAME: Moyai
MOYAI.DESCRIPTION: Play a sound when 🗿 emoji is sent or when reaction is added.

MULTISCROBBLER_WIP.NAME: MultiScrobbler
MULTISCROBBLER_WIP.DESCRIPTION: Show off your music status from Last.fm, Libre.fm, or ListenBrainz on your Discord profile.

PICTURELINKS.NAME: PictureLinks
PICTURELINKS.DESCRIPTION: Allows you to click on profile pictures and banners.

QUICKDELETE_WIP?.NAME: QuickDelete
QUICKDELETE_WIP?.DESCRIPTION: Automatically confirm delete popups for messages and embeds

REVIEWDB_WIP.NAME: ReviewDB
REVIEWDB_WIP.DESCRIPTION: Display and post reviews on user profiles.

SHOWIMAGELINKS.NAME: ShowImageLinks
SHOWIMAGELINKS.DESCRIPTION: Shows image links if the message is just a linked image.

SILLENTTYPING.NAME: SilentTyping
SILLENTTYPING.DESCRIPTION: Hides your typing status from others

STAFFTAGS.NAME: StaffTags
STAFFTAGS.DESCRIPTION: Shows extra tags for staff members.
STAFFTAGS.TAG_STYLE_DESC: Use top role color for tag backgrounds

TAPTAP.NAME: TapTap
TAPTAP.DESCRIPTION: Double-tap others to reply, Double-tap self to edit
TAPTAP.REPLY_ON_DOUBLE_TAP_DESC: Creates a pending reply when double-tapping messages
TAPTAP.EDIT_OWN_MESSAGES_DESC: Double-tap your own messages to edit
TAPTAP.TAP_USERNAME_TO_MENTION_DESC: Tap a username to insert an @mention into the chat input

TEXTREPLACE_WIP.NAME: TextReplace
TEXTREPLACE_WIP.DESCRIPTION: Replace text in messages with custom rules

TRANSLATOR_WIP.NAME: Translator
TRANSLATOR_WIP.DESCRIPTION: Translate messages using DeepL or Google Translate
